ℹ️ Recent review info
⚙️ Run configuration **Configuration used**: defaults **Review profile**: CHILL **Plan**: Pro Plus **Run ID**: `15f415b9-11cb-4274-896e-119726b33fcf`
📥 Commits Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between f303688cdd299b4bc23f26f1cdef803efa0832cd and 08cdda4e332733e19ac904f8818ad1860d894079.
📒 Files selected for processing (1) * `packages/client/src/components/Map/TransitMap.tsx`
---
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough The PR reorders the JSX declaration of the aircraft airspace overlay (`aircraft-markers` layer) to appear before the airports overlay block in TransitMap, ensuring the referenced layer exists when airports use `beforeId="aircraft-markers"`. Comments are updated to document this dependency requirement. ## Changes **Layer Ordering** | Layer / File(s) | Summary | |---|---| |**Aircraft Layer Reordering**
`packages/client/src/components/Map/TransitMap.tsx`|Aircraft airspace overlay (Source id="aircraft" / Layer id="aircraft-markers") moved earlier in JSX render order. Comments updated to document that airports depend on aircraft-markers being mounted first. Previous iconsReady-based ordering explanation removed from airports block.| ## Possibly related PRs - [cjunks94/panoptrain#40](https://github.com/cjunks94/panoptrain/pull/40): Modifies airport layer setup and references the aircraft-markers layer ordering that this PR establishes. - [cjunks94/panoptrain#39](https://github.com/cjunks94/panoptrain/pull/39): Addresses the same aircraft/airport layer registration and beforeId dependency issue in TransitMap. - [cjunks94/panoptrain#42](https://github.com/cjunks94/panoptrain/pull/42): Updates interactiveLayerIds and state cleanup tied to the aircraft and airport layers affected by this reordering. ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 2 (Simple) | ⏱️ ~8 minutes ## Poem > 🐰 *Layers dance in careful order,* > *Aircraft first, then airports gather.* > *MapLibre's rules we now remember—* > *Reference what exists, not phantom tether!* > *Hop forward, safe and sound.* 🎭

The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |
✅ Passed checks (4 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :------------------------: | :------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | The title accurately summarizes the main change: reordering JSX declarations so the aircraft Source mounts before airports, enabling beforeId resolution. It is concise, specific, and clearly describes the primary fix. | | Linked Issues check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. | | Out of Scope Changes check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. |
